chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3382 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.15303/2018 3. For hearing of main case 26.03.2025 Mr. Waqas Shaikh, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for respondent Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh On 21.10.2021, the following order was passed: “Solitary notice of attachment of bank account is challenged without any primary relief in this regard and individual notice alone for the attachment of the bank account in terms of Article 199 cannot be challenged. Petitioner’s counsel is put on notice to assist this court on the next date. Comments, if any, be filed before the next date failing whereof this matter will be heard on the materials available on record” Today, learned counsel once again remains unable to satisfy on the account of maintainability. Petition is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
